inputs.label: EBITDA
inputs.businessContext: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization for the period.

inputs.label: Interest Expense
inputs.businessContext: Total interest expense on all debt obligations for the period.

inputs.label: Current Debt Maturities
inputs.businessContext: Current portion of long-term debt and other scheduled principal repayments due within one year.

inputs.label: Lease Payments
inputs.businessContext: Total operating lease payments for the period.
